document.name: User Registration
document.description: Allow new users to create an account with username, password, and basic profile information
document.businessValue: Enable user onboarding and account creation to grow the user base
acceptanceCriteria: User can register with unique username and password
Password must meet security requirements (min 8 characters, alphanumeric)
Username must be unique across the system
User receives confirmation after successful registration
Invalid inputs show clear validation error messages
User is automatically logged in after successful registration

flows.name: Successful Registration
steps: User navigates to /register page
User enters username, password, confirm password, email, and full name
User clicks 'Register' button
System validates all inputs (username uniqueness, password strength, email format)
System hashes password using bcrypt
System creates new user record in database
System creates session token
System shows success message
System redirects user to dashboard

flows.name: Username Already Exists
steps: User enters username that already exists
User clicks 'Register' button
System checks username availability
System displays error: 'Username already taken. Please choose another.'
User remains on registration page to retry

flows.name: Password Mismatch
steps: User enters password and confirm password that don't match
User clicks 'Register' button
System validates password confirmation
System displays error: 'Passwords do not match'
User can correct the password fields

flows.name: Weak Password
steps: User enters password that doesn't meet requirements
User clicks 'Register' button
System validates password strength
System displays error: 'Password must be at least 8 characters with letters and numbers'
User can enter a stronger password

collections.name: users
collections.purpose: Store user account information and credentials

implementationRisk: Password must be hashed with bcrypt (salt rounds: 10)
Username uniqueness check must be case-insensitive
Email validation must follow RFC 5322 standard
Prevent timing attacks on username availability check
Rate limiting needed to prevent spam registrations
testStrategy: Unit test: password hashing and validation
Security test: XSS prevention in user inputs
nonFunctionalRequirements: Password hashing must use bcrypt with salt rounds >= 10
Comply with GDPR for user data storage
